operators.what_it_is: Connects TouchDesigner to Ableton Link for shared tempo, beat, and transport synchronization.
operators.mental_model: A shared musical clock that multiple apps agree to follow.
operators.example: Sync TouchDesigner visuals to the tempo and beat of Ableton Live.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It makes TouchDesigner follow the same beat as music apps.

operators.what_it_is: Connects TouchDesigner to Ableton Link for shared tempo, beat, and transport synchronization.
operators.mental_model: A shared musical clock that multiple apps agree to follow.
operators.example: Sync TouchDesigner visuals to the tempo and beat of Ableton Live.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It makes TouchDesigner follow the same beat as music apps.

operators.what_it_is: Converts and reorders angular data between different angle representations.
operators.mental_model: A translator that changes how angles are measured and ordered.
operators.example: Convert rotation data from degrees to radians before driving a transform.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It changes how turning numbers are counted and lined up.

operators.what_it_is: Modifies quaternion attributes and rotation order on channel data.
operators.mental_model: A tool that edits how rotation information is stored and applied.
operators.example: Replace quaternion rotation data before exporting to another operator.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It edits how spinning directions are saved.

operators.what_it_is: Applies multi-band equalization to audio signals.
operators.mental_model: A sound mixer that turns different pitch ranges up or down.
operators.example: Boost low frequencies and reduce harsh highs in a music-driven visual.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It changes how loud different sounds are.

operators.what_it_is: Processes audio for binaural spatial listening.
operators.mental_model: A sound processor that makes audio feel like it’s coming from space around you.
operators.example: Create 3D-positioned sound that feels left, right, near, or far.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It makes sound feel like it’s moving around your head.

operators.what_it_is: Captures live audio input from an audio device into TouchDesigner.
operators.mental_model: A microphone jack that feeds sound into the system.
operators.example: Bring in live microphone or mixer input to drive audio-reactive visuals.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It lets sound come into TouchDesigner.

operators.what_it_is: Sends audio from TouchDesigner to an external audio device.
operators.mental_model: A speaker jack that sends sound out of the system.
operators.example: Play generated or processed audio through speakers or headphones.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It sends sound out to speakers.

operators.what_it_is: Applies dynamic range processing such as compression and limiting to audio signals.
operators.mental_model: An automatic volume controller that keeps sound under control.
operators.example: Compress loud peaks so music-driven visuals stay stable.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It keeps sounds from getting too loud or too quiet.

operators.what_it_is: Loads and plays audio files into TouchDesigner.
operators.mental_model: A music player that turns sound files into channels.
operators.example: Play a song file and use its waveform to animate visuals.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It plays a sound file inside TouchDesigner.

operators.what_it_is: Applies frequency-based filtering to audio signals.
operators.mental_model: A sieve that lets certain sound frequencies through and blocks others.
operators.example: Remove low rumble from an audio signal before analysis.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It lets only certain sounds pass through.

operators.what_it_is: Extracts and plays audio from a movie file or Movie TOP.
operators.mental_model: Pulling the sound out of a video.
operators.example: Use the soundtrack of a movie to drive visuals.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It takes sound out of a video.

operators.what_it_is: Receives audio streams over NDI from the network.
operators.mental_model: Listening to sound sent over the network.
operators.example: Receive live audio from another computer running TouchDesigner.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It hears sound coming from another computer.

operators.what_it_is: Generates synthetic audio waveforms.
operators.mental_model: A sound generator that makes tones from math.
operators.example: Create a sine wave tone to test audio systems.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It makes sounds by itself.

operators.what_it_is: Applies power-based equalization with frequency and bandwidth control.
operators.mental_model: A precise sound shaper that boosts or cuts specific frequency ranges.
operators.example: Emphasize certain frequency bands to accent visual reactions.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It makes certain sounds stronger or softer.

operators.what_it_is: Plays audio from CHOP channels through an output device.
operators.mental_model: A play button for sound already inside TouchDesigner.
operators.example: Send processed audio channels to speakers.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It plays sounds you already have.

operators.what_it_is: Simulates and renders spatial audio using positional and acoustic modeling.
operators.mental_model: A virtual room that calculates how sound moves and bounces.
operators.example: Render realistic 3D sound that reflects off walls and objects.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It makes sound behave like it’s in a real place.

operators.what_it_is: Performs spectral analysis and synthesis on audio signals using FFT.
operators.mental_model: A machine that breaks sound into its frequency ingredients and puts it back together.
operators.example: Analyze music frequencies to drive bars or waveforms.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It shows what sounds are inside the sound.

operators.what_it_is: Receives streamed audio from network sources.
operators.mental_model: Listening to live sound coming from the internet.
operators.example: Receive audio from a remote stream or WebRTC source.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It hears sound coming from online.

operators.what_it_is: Streams audio from TouchDesigner to the network.
operators.mental_model: Broadcasting sound to other computers.
operators.example: Send live-generated audio to a remote client.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It sends sound out over the internet.

operators.what_it_is: Hosts and controls audio plugins using the BST plugin system.
operators.mental_model: A rack that loads audio plugins and lets them talk to TouchDesigner.
operators.example: Load a third-party audio effect plugin and control it with channels.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It lets TouchDesigner use audio plugins.

operators.what_it_is: Outputs audio generated by a Web Render TOP.
operators.mental_model: Taking sound from a web page and turning it into channels.
operators.example: Use audio from a web app or online player inside TouchDesigner.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It grabs sound from a website.

operators.what_it_is: Generates tempo-based timing signals such as beats, bars, and ramps.
operators.mental_model: A musical metronome that outputs timing signals.
operators.example: Drive animations based on musical beats and bars.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It makes rhythm signals you can use.

operators.what_it_is: Binds CHOP channels to parameters or external values with flexible matching rules.
operators.mental_model: A cable that automatically connects channels to controls.
operators.example: Bind incoming channels to multiple parameters by name.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It connects numbers to knobs automatically.

operators.what_it_is: Receives and processes real-time tracking data from the BlackTrax system.
operators.mental_model: A motion tracking receiver that knows where things are and how they move.
operators.example: Track performers on stage and drive visuals from their movement.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It listens to a system that tracks moving things.

operators.what_it_is: Combines multiple CHOP inputs using different blending methods.
operators.mental_model: A mixer that merges several number streams into one.
operators.example: Blend animation channels from different sources.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It mixes numbers together.

operators.what_it_is: Tracks points or blobs over time and outputs motion data.
operators.mental_model: A watcher that follows moving dots and remembers where they go.
operators.example: Track blobs from a camera feed to generate motion channels.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It follows moving spots.

operators.what_it_is: Outputs human body tracking data including keypoints, rotations, and 3D information.
operators.mental_model: A system that understands where people’s bodies are and how they move.
operators.example: Drive character animation or visuals from detected human poses.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It knows where people’s bodies are.

operators.what_it_is: Extracts physics simulation data from a Bullet Solver or Actor component.
operators.mental_model: A reporter that reads motion and collision data from a physics world.
operators.example: Use physics-driven movement to control animation parameters.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It reads movement from a physics simulation.

operators.what_it_is: Plays and blends animation clips using rules and timing controls.
operators.mental_model: A playlist for motion clips that knows how to transition between them.
operators.example: Blend smoothly between walk and run animation clips.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It plays and switches between movement clips.

operators.what_it_is: Blends and transitions between multiple animation clips.
operators.mental_model: A DJ crossfader for motion clips.
operators.example: Smoothly blend between two motion clips based on timing or triggers.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It mixes movement clips together.

operators.what_it_is: Outputs time and calendar information as channels.
operators.mental_model: A digital clock that turns time into numbers.
operators.example: Drive visuals based on the current time or date.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It tells TouchDesigner what time it is.

operators.what_it_is: Calculates sun and moon position data based on time and location.
operators.mental_model: An astronomy calculator for sunlight and moon cycles.
operators.example: Change lighting based on real sunrise and sunset times.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It knows where the sun and moon are.

operators.what_it_is: Combines and blends animation or motion channels with advanced rules.
operators.mental_model: A smart mixer that understands motion and timing.
operators.example: Blend rotation channels using shortest-path logic.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It mixes movements in smart ways.

operators.what_it_is: Outputs constant channel values that do not change over time.
operators.mental_model: A knob that always stays at the same number.
operators.example: Provide a steady value to drive a parameter or blend.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It makes a number that stays the same.

operators.what_it_is: Duplicates or combines channel data using copy or convolution methods.
operators.mental_model: A copier that repeats or stamps channels in different ways.
operators.example: Copy animation channels across multiple objects.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It copies numbers in useful ways.

operators.what_it_is: Counts events based on trigger conditions and thresholds.
operators.mental_model: A counter that goes up or down when something happens.
operators.example: Count how many times a trigger signal fires.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It counts how many times something happens.

operators.what_it_is: Freezes or dampens channel changes using a simple crossfade control.
operators.mental_model: A brake that slows numbers down.
operators.example: Smooth sudden jumps in animation channels.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It stops numbers from changing too fast.

operators.what_it_is: Repeats and blends channel sequences over time.
operators.mental_model: A looping tape that can blend its ends.
operators.example: Loop a motion cycle smoothly.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It repeats movements smoothly.

operators.what_it_is: Converts table data from a DAT into CHOP channels.
operators.mental_model: A translator that turns spreadsheet rows into number streams.
operators.example: Drive animation channels from a table of values.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It turns table numbers into moving numbers.

operators.what_it_is: Removes or filters channels and samples based on value, range, and comparison rules.
operators.mental_model: A sieve that drops channels or samples that don’t meet rules.
operators.example: Delete channels whose values stay within a specific range.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It throws away numbers you don’t want.

operators.what_it_is: Receives DMX lighting control data from hardware or network protocols.
operators.mental_model: An inbox for lighting control signals.
operators.example: Bring lighting console data into TouchDesigner.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It listens to lighting control signals.

operators.what_it_is: Sends DMX lighting control data to hardware or network protocols.
operators.mental_model: An outbox that sends lighting commands.
operators.example: Control stage lights from TouchDesigner.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It sends commands to lights.

operators.what_it_is: Extracts amplitude envelopes and signal power characteristics from channels.
operators.mental_model: A shape that shows how strong a signal is over time.
operators.example: Measure audio loudness to drive visual intensity.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It shows how big a sound or signal is.

operators.what_it_is: Generates events with ADSR-style timing and state tracking.
operators.mental_model: A trigger system that remembers its life cycle.
operators.example: Trigger animations with attack and release behavior.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It makes events that turn on and off smoothly.

operators.what_it_is: Evaluates expressions to generate or modify channel data.
operators.mental_model: A calculator that runs formulas every frame.
operators.example: Create procedural motion using math expressions.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It does math to make numbers move.

operators.what_it_is: Defines how channel values behave beyond their defined range.
operators.mental_model: Rules for what happens before the start or after the end of data.
operators.example: Hold the last value when animation data ends.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It decides what happens when data runs out.

operators.what_it_is: Outputs facial tracking data including landmarks, meshes, and rotations.
operators.mental_model: A system that understands how a face is shaped and moving.
operators.example: Drive facial animation from live camera input.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It tracks how a face moves.

operators.what_it_is: Redistributes channel data by fanning channels in or out.
operators.mental_model: A splitter or combiner for channel streams.
operators.example: Spread a single channel across many outputs.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It spreads numbers out or pulls them together.

operators.what_it_is: Feeds previous channel values back into the current frame.
operators.mental_model: A memory loop for numbers.
operators.example: Create accumulating or delayed motion effects.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It remembers what happened before.

operators.what_it_is: Loads channel data from external files.
operators.mental_model: A file reader for animation data.
operators.example: Import motion capture or recorded animation.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It loads numbers from a file.

operators.what_it_is: Writes channel data to external files at specified intervals.
operators.mental_model: A recorder that saves numbers to disk.
operators.example: Record animation channels to a file for later playback.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It saves numbers into a file.

operators.what_it_is: Applies mathematical filtering and smoothing to channel data.
operators.mental_model: A noise reducer that smooths or reshapes number changes.
operators.example: Smooth jittery motion data.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It smooths numbers.

operators.what_it_is: Receives FreeD camera tracking data over the network.
operators.mental_model: An inbox for camera position and lens data.
operators.example: Drive virtual camera movement from a tracked real camera.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It listens to camera tracking data.

operators.what_it_is: Applies mathematical functions to channel values.
operators.mental_model: A math machine that transforms numbers.
operators.example: Apply exponential or trigonometric math to channels.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It does math tricks on numbers.

operators.what_it_is: Controls gesture-based playback and blending of motion data.
operators.mental_model: A gesture reader that decides how motion should play.
operators.example: Trigger and blend motion clips based on detected gestures.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It plays movements when you make gestures.

operators.what_it_is: Generates handle-based control data for interactive manipulation.
operators.mental_model: A virtual handle you can grab and move.
operators.example: Rotate or manipulate objects interactively.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It lets you grab and move things.

operators.what_it_is: Controls cooking and timing behavior of CHOP data.
operators.mental_model: A throttle that controls when data updates.
operators.example: Delay or force updates in a CHOP network.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It controls when numbers update.

operators.what_it_is: Receives laser rangefinder data from a Hokuyo sensor.
operators.mental_model: A laser scanner that measures distances.
operators.example: Use LiDAR-style distance data to drive visuals.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It reads distances using a laser.

operators.what_it_is: Holds channel values based on sampling rules.
operators.mental_model: A sample-and-hold circuit for numbers.
operators.example: Freeze values at specific moments.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It freezes numbers in place.

operators.what_it_is: Selects and imports animation data from parent components.
operators.mental_model: A selector that pulls motion from somewhere else.
operators.example: Import animation channels from a parent COMP.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It brings in movement from somewhere else.

operators.what_it_is: Controls playback of animation channels over time.
operators.mental_model: A video player for motion data.
operators.example: Play, loop, or scrub animation channels.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It plays movement over time.

operators.what_it_is: Receives CHOP data from outside the current component.
operators.mental_model: An inlet where numbers come into the network.
operators.example: Bring CHOP data into a Base COMP from another network.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It lets numbers come in from somewhere else.

operators.what_it_is: Outputs diagnostic and performance information about operators.
operators.mental_model: A status panel that reports what’s happening inside operators.
operators.example: Monitor cook times and performance of a CHOP network.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It tells you what the system is doing.

operators.what_it_is: Interpolates between channel values using different shapes and priorities.
operators.mental_model: A smoother that fills in gaps between values.
operators.example: Smooth transitions between animation poses.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It fills in the space between numbers.

operators.what_it_is: Generates curve-based data for immersive or skeletal systems.
operators.mental_model: A flexible curve that guides motion or deformation.
operators.example: Drive skeletal or path-based animation using curves.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It makes smooth paths for movement.

operators.what_it_is: Solves inverse kinematics for bone chains.
operators.mental_model: A solver that figures out how joints should bend to reach a point.
operators.example: Make an arm reach a target automatically.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It figures out how joints move to reach something.

operators.what_it_is: Joins and blends multiple CHOP inputs using structured blending rules.
operators.mental_model: A stitcher that sews motion streams together.
operators.example: Blend motion sequences across different inputs.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It joins movements together smoothly.

operators.what_it_is: Reads input data from a joystick or game controller.
operators.mental_model: A controller reader that turns sticks and buttons into numbers.
operators.example: Use a gamepad to control camera movement or parameters.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It reads buttons and sticks from a controller.

operators.what_it_is: Outputs keyboard input as channels.
operators.mental_model: A keyboard listener that turns key presses into numbers.
operators.example: Trigger events or animations with keyboard input.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It knows which keys are being pressed.

operators.what_it_is: Outputs keyframed animation data.
operators.mental_model: A timeline that plays stored animation curves.
operators.example: Play back authored animation inside TouchDesigner.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It plays drawn animation curves.

operators.what_it_is: Receives skeletal and tracking data from a depth camera system.
operators.mental_model: A body-tracking reader that knows where people are in space.
operators.example: Drive characters or visuals from tracked human movement.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It tracks how people move.

operators.what_it_is: Smooths channel changes over time using lag-based methods.
operators.mental_model: A shock absorber for numbers.
operators.example: Smooth sudden jumps in motion or sensor data.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It makes changes happen more slowly.

operators.what_it_is: Generates and controls laser scanning and color output data.
operators.mental_model: A laser plotter that knows where to draw and what color to use.
operators.example: Drive a laser projector with shapes and color timing.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It tells a laser where to draw and what color to be.

operators.what_it_is: Receives hand, finger, and gesture tracking data from a Leap Motion device.
operators.mental_model: A hand-tracking reader that understands fingers and gestures in the air.
operators.example: Control visuals or parameters using hand movements and gestures.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It watches your hands move in the air.

operators.what_it_is: Receives object and blob tracking data from a Leuze ROD4 sensor.
operators.mental_model: A sensor reader that tracks moving points and blobs in a defined area.
operators.example: Track people or objects crossing a sensor field.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It tracks moving points from a special sensor.

operators.what_it_is: Generates low-frequency oscillation signals.
operators.mental_model: A slow wave generator for motion and modulation.
operators.example: Create looping sine waves to animate parameters.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It makes slow repeating waves.

operators.what_it_is: Constrains and quantizes channel values within defined limits.
operators.mental_model: A fence that keeps numbers within bounds.
operators.example: Clamp animation values to a safe range.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It stops numbers from going too far.

operators.what_it_is: Performs logical operations and comparisons on channel data.
operators.mental_model: A decision machine that compares numbers and outputs true or false results.
operators.example: Trigger events when values cross thresholds.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It decides yes or no based on numbers.

operators.what_it_is: Maps channel values through lookup tables or index ranges.
operators.mental_model: A chart that converts one number into another.
operators.example: Remap input values to custom curves or ranges.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It changes numbers using a table.

operators.what_it_is: Receives and decodes Linear Timecode (LTC) signals.
operators.mental_model: A clock reader that listens to timecode audio.
operators.example: Sync TouchDesigner playback to external timecode.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It listens to a time signal.

operators.what_it_is: Generates Linear Timecode (LTC) signals.
operators.mental_model: A clock that sends timecode out as audio.
operators.example: Send timecode to synchronize external systems.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It sends a time signal out.

operators.what_it_is: Applies bass-style channel processing with pre/post operations and interpolation.
operators.mental_model: A low-level channel processor that reshapes numbers before and after combining.
operators.example: Prepare channel data before mixing or logic operations.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It adjusts numbers before and after mixing them.

operators.what_it_is: Adds multiple channel values together with scaling and range control.
operators.mental_model: A calculator that adds many numbers with rules.
operators.example: Sum several modulation signals into one output.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It adds lots of numbers together.

operators.what_it_is: Merges multiple CHOP inputs into a single output.
operators.mental_model: A zipper that joins channel lists together.
operators.example: Combine channels from different sources.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It puts channels together.

operators.what_it_is: Receives MIDI input data and converts it to channels.
operators.mental_model: A MIDI listener that turns notes and controls into numbers.
operators.example: Use a MIDI keyboard to control visuals.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It listens to musical controllers.

operators.what_it_is: Maps MIDI input devices to channels using configurable sliders and buttons.
operators.mental_model: A MIDI router that turns controls into named channels.
operators.example: Map MIDI controller sliders and buttons to animation controls.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It connects music knobs and buttons to numbers.

operators.what_it_is: Sends channel data out as MIDI messages.
operators.mental_model: A MIDI sender that turns numbers into musical commands.
operators.example: Control external synths or DAWs from TouchDesigner.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It sends music commands out.

operators.what_it_is: Receives tracking data from a MOSIS camera system.
operators.mental_model: A camera-tracking receiver for position data.
operators.example: Drive visuals using MOSIS camera tracking.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It listens to a tracking camera.

operators.what_it_is: Reads mouse position, buttons, and wheel input as channels.
operators.mental_model: A mouse listener that turns movement and clicks into numbers.
operators.example: Control parameters with mouse movement and clicks.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It knows where the mouse is and which buttons are pressed.

operators.what_it_is: Outputs channel data as mouse position and button events.
operators.mental_model: A fake mouse that moves and clicks using numbers.
operators.example: Drive mouse input programmatically.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It moves the mouse using numbers.

operators.what_it_is: Receives camera tracking data over the network from an NCam system.
operators.mental_model: A camera-tracking receiver over the network.
operators.example: Drive virtual camera motion from NCam tracking.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It listens to camera tracking data.

operators.what_it_is: Generates procedural noise signals.
operators.mental_model: A random wave generator with controls.
operators.example: Create organic motion or randomness.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It makes wiggly random numbers.

operators.what_it_is: Passes channels through unchanged, with optional cooking controls.
operators.mental_model: A wire that does nothing but can be switched.
operators.example: Use as an endpoint or debugging reference.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It passes numbers through without changing them.

operators.what_it_is: Controls and monitors an Oak sensor device and its data streams.
operators.mental_model: A controller that starts, runs, and reports the state of a sensor device.
operators.example: Initialize an Oak camera and monitor when it is ready or running.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It turns a sensor on and tells you what it’s doing.

operators.what_it_is: Selects and buffers streams coming from an Oak Device CHOP.
operators.mental_model: A picker that chooses which sensor stream to listen to.
operators.example: Select a specific Oak data stream and control its buffering.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It chooses which sensor data to use.

operators.what_it_is: Computes spatial relationships between objects, such as position, rotation, and distance.
operators.mental_model: A ruler and compass for objects in 3D space.
operators.example: Measure distance and bearing between two objects.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It tells you how objects are placed compared to each other.

operators.what_it_is: Receives tracking, controller, and action data from OpenVR-compatible VR systems.
operators.mental_model: A VR data reader that knows where headsets, controllers, and trackers are.
operators.example: Drive camera or object motion from a VR headset and controllers.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It reads where VR gear is in space.

operators.what_it_is: Receives motion capture data from an OptiTrack system.
operators.mental_model: A motion-capture receiver for tracked bodies and markers.
operators.example: Use OptiTrack mocap data to animate characters.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It listens to a motion-capture system.

operators.what_it_is: Receives Open Control System (OCS) data over the network.
operators.mental_model: An inbox for structured control messages.
operators.example: Receive structured control data from another system.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It receives control messages from the network.

operators.what_it_is: Sends Open Control System (OCS) data over the network.
operators.mental_model: An outbox for structured control messages.
operators.example: Send control data to external systems using OCS.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It sends control messages over the network.

operators.what_it_is: Outputs CHOP data from a component to the outside network.
operators.mental_model: An outlet where numbers leave the component.
operators.example: Expose CHOP channels from inside a Base COMP.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It lets numbers go out.

operators.what_it_is: Controls pan and tilt values with reset and clamping behavior.
operators.mental_model: A head that turns left–right and up–down.
operators.example: Control camera or light pan/tilt movement.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It turns things left, right, up, and down.

operators.what_it_is: Outputs interaction and state data from panel components.
operators.mental_model: A listener that watches UI panels and events.
operators.example: React to button presses or mouse events on panels.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It listens to buttons and panels.

operators.what_it_is: Generates and sends laser control data to Pangolin laser systems.
operators.mental_model: A laser controller that speaks Pangolin’s language.
operators.example: Drive Pangolin laser hardware with CHOP data.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It controls professional laser systems.

operators.what_it_is: Fetches and outputs parameter values from operators as channels.
operators.mental_model: A reader that turns operator settings into numbers.
operators.example: Expose transform parameters as channels for further processing.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It turns knobs into numbers.

operators.what_it_is: Generates repeating numeric patterns and sequences.
operators.mental_model: A pattern machine that makes repeating shapes of numbers.
operators.example: Create rhythmic step patterns to drive animation.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It makes repeating number patterns.

operators.what_it_is: Outputs performance and system statistics as channels.
operators.mental_model: A dashboard that reports how hard the system is working.
operators.example: Monitor CPU, GPU, and frame timing during playback.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It shows how fast and hard the computer is running.

operators.what_it_is: Applies phase-based filtering to channel data.
operators.mental_model: A filter that shifts parts of a signal forward or backward in phase.
operators.example: Create sweeping phase effects on audio or modulation channels.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It makes signals wobble in a wave-like way.

operators.what_it_is: Receives channel data from an external pipe connection.
operators.mental_model: A tube that brings numbers in from another process.
operators.example: Receive real-time data from an external application.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It brings numbers in through a pipe.

operators.what_it_is: Sends CHOP data out through a pipe connection to another process.
operators.mental_model: A tube that pushes numbers out to another program.
operators.example: Send real-time channel data to an external application.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It sends numbers out through a pipe.

operators.what_it_is: Downloads and converts data from a POP source into CHOP channels.
operators.mental_model: A data extractor that pulls selected pieces from a stream.
operators.example: Thin and rename incoming POP data before use.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It pulls specific numbers out of a stream.

operators.what_it_is: Receives PosiStageNet tracking data over the network.
operators.mental_model: A tracker that listens for position data on the network.
operators.example: Track performers or objects using PosiStageNet.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It listens for position tracking data.

operators.what_it_is: Generates timed pulse signals with flexible spacing and shaping.
operators.mental_model: A pulse generator that fires beats or flashes.
operators.example: Trigger events at controlled intervals.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It makes repeating blips.

operators.what_it_is: Records incoming CHOP channel data over time.
operators.mental_model: A tape recorder for numbers.
operators.example: Capture motion data to replay or analyze later.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It records numbers so you can play them back.

operators.what_it_is: Renames CHOP channels using simple rules.
operators.mental_model: A label maker for channels.
operators.example: Standardize channel names before merging data.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It changes channel names.

operators.what_it_is: Performs object picking from rendered scenes and outputs pick results as channels.
operators.mental_model: A selector that figures out what you clicked or pointed at in 3D.
operators.example: Detect which object the mouse is hovering over in a rendered scene.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It figures out what you clicked on.

operators.what_it_is: Receives streamed render data from an external rendering source.
operators.mental_model: A video-and-data feed coming from another renderer.
operators.example: Receive scene depth or ID data from a remote render process.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It listens to render data coming in.

operators.what_it_is: Reorders channels using explicit patterns, references, or randomized rules.
operators.mental_model: A sorter that rearranges channels into a new order.
operators.example: Reorder channels to match a required output layout.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It changes the order of the channels.

operators.what_it_is: Replaces channel values over a defined length and can notify on changes.
operators.mental_model: A swapper that overwrites parts of a signal.
operators.example: Temporarily replace live input with fixed values.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It swaps numbers with new ones.

operators.what_it_is: Changes the sampling rate or length of channel data.
operators.mental_model: A time stretcher or compressor for numbers.
operators.example: Match CHOP data to a different frame rate.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It changes how fast numbers are sampled.

operators.what_it_is: Applies an S-shaped curve to remap values smoothly.
operators.mental_model: A curve that eases values in and out.
operators.example: Smooth acceleration and deceleration of motion.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It makes smooth curves instead of sharp changes.

operators.what_it_is: Executes custom Python scripts and callbacks tied to CHOP behavior.
operators.mental_model: A hook that runs custom code alongside channel processing.
operators.example: Modify parameters or external state without relying on Cook.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It runs your own code when things happen.

operators.what_it_is: Selects, filters, and renames channels from incoming CHOPs.
operators.mental_model: A filter that picks which channels to keep.
operators.example: Extract only specific channels by name or pattern.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It picks the channels you want.

operators.what_it_is: Sequences and blends channel data using queued triggers.
operators.mental_model: A timeline that plays steps in order.
operators.example: Trigger and blend animation steps in sequence.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It plays steps one after another.

operators.what_it_is: Communicates with serial devices and outputs received data as channels.
operators.mental_model: A cable that talks to hardware over serial.
operators.example: Read sensor data from an Arduino.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It talks to hardware through a cable.

operators.what_it_is: Reads channel data from shared memory.
operators.mental_model: A shared clipboard for numbers between processes.
operators.example: Receive data from another application via shared memory.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It reads numbers shared by another program.

operators.what_it_is: Writes channel data to shared memory.
operators.mental_model: A shared clipboard that other programs can read.
operators.example: Send real-time data to another application.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It shares numbers with another program.

operators.what_it_is: Offsets channel data in time or value space.
operators.mental_model: A slider that moves data forward or backward.
operators.example: Delay or advance signals without resampling.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It moves numbers left or right.

operators.what_it_is: Reorders samples or channels using shuffle rules.
operators.mental_model: A deck shuffler for data.
operators.example: Randomize or reorder samples.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It mixes the order of numbers.

operators.what_it_is: Calculates the rate of change (slope) of channel values.
operators.mental_model: A speedometer for numbers.
operators.example: Detect acceleration or trends.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It tells how fast numbers are changing.

operators.what_it_is: Converts SOP geometry attributes into CHOP channels.
operators.mental_model: A translator that turns shapes into numbers.
operators.example: Extract positions or colors from geometry.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It turns shapes into numbers.

operators.what_it_is: Sorts samples or channels based on selected criteria.
operators.mental_model: A sorter that lines numbers up.
operators.example: Order samples by value or index.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It puts numbers in order.

operators.what_it_is: Integrates speed and acceleration to produce motion-like behavior.
operators.mental_model: A motion engine with limits and resets.
operators.example: Simulate velocity-driven movement.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It makes numbers move like motion.

operators.what_it_is: Cuts, inserts, and blends sections of channel data.
operators.mental_model: A video editor for numbers.
operators.example: Trim a segment of motion and insert a new interpolated section.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It cuts and pastes parts of the numbers.

operators.what_it_is: Simulates spring–mass dynamics on channel values.
operators.mental_model: A bouncy spring that follows input with weight and damping.
operators.example: Add natural lag and bounce to animation controls.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It makes numbers bounce like a spring.

operators.what_it_is: Interfaces with SMPTE ST 2110 network media devices.
operators.mental_model: A network device controller for professional media streams.
operators.example: Configure and monitor an ST 2110 media device.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It talks to a professional media box on the network.

operators.what_it_is: Stretches or compresses channel data over time.
operators.mental_model: A rubber band that makes data longer or shorter.
operators.example: Time-stretch motion data to fit a duration.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It squishes or stretches numbers in time.

operators.what_it_is: Receives SType protocol data over the network and outputs it as channels.
operators.mental_model: A network listener that understands SType packets.
operators.example: Receive structured control or tracking data via SType.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It listens for special network messages.

operators.what_it_is: Sends CHOP data over the network using the SType protocol.
operators.mental_model: A network sender that packages numbers into SType packets.
operators.example: Transmit control data to another system via SType.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It sends special network messages.

operators.what_it_is: Selects one input CHOP from multiple inputs based on an index.
operators.mental_model: A selector switch that chooses one signal at a time.
operators.example: Toggle between multiple control sources.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It picks one input to use.

operators.what_it_is: Receives synchronization data over the network for timing alignment.
operators.mental_model: A clock listener that syncs timing with others.
operators.example: Synchronize playback across multiple machines.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It keeps time with other computers.

operators.what_it_is: Sends synchronization timing data to other systems over the network.
operators.mental_model: A clock broadcaster that keeps others in sync.
operators.example: Synchronize timelines across multiple machines.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It sends time to other computers.

operators.what_it_is: Reads pen tablet input including position, pressure, tilt, and buttons.
operators.mental_model: A tablet listener that turns pen movement into numbers.
operators.example: Use a drawing tablet to control parameters or draw gestures.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It reads what a pen is doing on a tablet.

operators.what_it_is: Controls how channel data is evaluated per time slice.
operators.mental_model: A rulebook for how time chunks are handled.
operators.example: Change how CHOPs process data over time slices.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It decides how time pieces are used.

operators.what_it_is: Generates complex timing, segment, and cycle-based signals.
operators.mental_model: A programmable stopwatch with segments and cycles.
operators.example: Drive sequenced events with precise timing.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It’s a very smart stopwatch.

operators.what_it_is: Receives externally driven timing or channel data.
operators.mental_model: A bridge that lets outside time control the system.
operators.example: Drive timing from an external timecode or controller.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It lets outside time control things.

operators.what_it_is: Converts image data from a TOP into CHOP channels.
operators.mental_model: A pixel reader that turns image colors into numbers.
operators.example: Extract luminance or color channels from an image.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It turns pictures into numbers.

operators.what_it_is: Receives touch interaction data over the network.
operators.mental_model: A listener for finger and touch messages.
operators.example: Receive multitouch input from another device.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It listens for finger touches.

operators.what_it_is: Sends touch interaction data over the network.
operators.mental_model: A sender that broadcasts touch events.
operators.example: Forward touch input to another system.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It sends finger touch messages.

operators.what_it_is: Accumulates and outputs historical channel values over time.
operators.mental_model: A tail that shows where values have been.
operators.example: Visualize motion trails or keep recent history of signals.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It remembers where numbers were before.

operators.what_it_is: Applies weighted and ordered transformations to channel data.
operators.mental_model: A mixer that transforms numbers using position, rotation, and scale rules.
operators.example: Combine multiple motion inputs into a final transform.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It moves and rotates numbers in smart ways.

operators.what_it_is: Applies XYZ-based transformations to channel data.
operators.mental_model: A simpler transformer that works directly in XYZ space.
operators.example: Apply position and rotation transforms using XYZ channels.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It moves numbers using X, Y, and Z.

operators.what_it_is: Generates trigger-driven envelopes with attack, sustain, and release phases.
operators.mental_model: An envelope generator that reacts when a signal crosses a threshold.
operators.example: Create ADSR-style envelopes from incoming trigger signals.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It makes a shape when something turns on and off.

operators.what_it_is: Trims or discards sections of channel data based on units and start rules.
operators.mental_model: Scissors that cut off parts of the numbers.
operators.example: Remove leading or trailing samples from a signal.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It cuts parts off the numbers.

operators.what_it_is: Warps channel indices to remap data length or timing.
operators.mental_model: A rubber ruler that bends how indices line up.
operators.example: Stretch or compress index mapping without resampling.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It bends how numbers line up.

operators.what_it_is: Generates waveform signals with optional decay and ramp shaping.
operators.mental_model: A wave machine that makes repeating shapes.
operators.example: Create oscillating signals for animation or modulation.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It makes wave-shaped numbers.

operators.what_it_is: Outputs tracking, plane, and body data from a ZED camera system.
operators.mental_model: A depth camera reader that understands space, planes, and bodies.
operators.example: Use ZED plane detection and body tracking to drive interactions.
operators.explain_like_im_five: It reads space and people from a depth camera.
